title: Could the secret to black hole formation be locked away in this record-breaking ancient quasar?
description: The quasar existed 12.9 billion years ago and shows that supermassive black holes were able to age rapidly in the early universe.

title: Fossil fuel imports: India’s silent villain; bioenergy delivers independence
description: With crude and gas imports draining over $165 billion annually, India faces a structural economic vulnerability. Discover how scaling up biomass pellets, compressed biogas (CBG), and ethanol can insulate the rupee and transform farms into fuel hubs.

title: The Ancient Roots of Modern Winemaking
